reasoning: The 'inferno.sh' flagged as unsafe is part of NDK's simpleperf tool (legitimate profiling tool) and not executed during package build/install. Qwen's finding is a false positive as AUR only concerns itself with build/install execution contexts.
disagreement_analysis: Qwen incorrectly flagged inferno.sh (profiling tool script) as malicious execution, while Deepseek missed reviewing this file entirely.
coverage_issues: qwen missed reviewing several CMake files analyzed by deepseek
false_positives: qwen: inferno.sh - normal profiling tool script not executed during packaging
learnings: Prioritize files in simpleperf/ directory when auditing NDK packages
Improve model understanding of Android NDK toolchain components
Enhance file selection to ensure coverage of all executable scripts in source tree
Train models to better distinguish between bundled tools vs build/install execution risks
